entries.answer: Hi! How can I be of assistance?
How may I help?
To notify the golf cart, call the BSO office: 740-593-1951
Of course! Let me know if I can be of further assistance!
BSO Email: orientation@ohio.edu

Business (B) has advising in Tupper, rooms 301, 304, & 307

A is Arts and Science
B is Business
C is Communications
D is Education
E is Engineering
F is Fine Arts

All color group signs go to Morton 122 after belonging
